description: CodeSandbox is a cloud development platform for creating and running browser-based and VM-based sandboxed development environments. It also offers the CodeSandbox SDK for programmatically provisioning isolated sandboxes for code execution and AI-agent use cases.
summary: CodeSandbox exposes documented HTTP developer surfaces for its SDK API and an older browser-sandbox define/import API; the SDK uses a user-generated API key, while no GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI surface could be confirmed from the reviewed public docs.
